    About Us

    Wire Wound Potentiometers

    Precision wire wound potentiometers for industrial, instrumentation, servo, and defence applications. Available in servo, linear, ganged, and custom configurations.

    Servo Potentiometer

    12W Potentiometer

    1W Potentiometer

    Ganged Potentiometer

    Linear Potentiometer

    Standard Servo Potentiometers

    Our standard range of servo potentiometers for position feedback in servo systems, robotics, and precision instrumentation.

    Standard servo potentiometer specifications
    SpecificationETC/SE/37ETC/SE/50.5ETC/SE/64ETC/SE/76
    A (mm)3750.56476
    B (mm)20282828
    C (mm)25252525
    D (mm)66.356.356.35
    Resistance Value20Ω–10KΩ30Ω–50KΩ50Ω–68KΩ100Ω–100KΩ
    Tolerance5%5%5%5%
    Linearity (IND)2%1%0.5%0.5%
    Resolution0.3%–0.03%SameSameSame

    Custom Potentiometer Solutions

    We manufacture potentiometers to your exact requirements. Our engineering team specializes in precision resistance components for demanding applications.

    Resistance & Tolerance

    Custom resistance values from 20Ω to 100KΩ with precision tolerances down to ±0.01%. Special taper profiles including linear, logarithmic, and custom functions.

    Shaft & Mounting

    Various shaft types and lengths. Panel mount, PCB mount, servo flange, and custom mounting configurations to suit any enclosure.

    Multi-Gang & Multi-Turn

    Ganged potentiometers with matched tracking. Multi-turn precision units for fine adjustment in instrumentation and calibration.

    Thermal & Environmental

    Extended temperature range designs from −55°C to +200°C. Sealed and tropicalised options for harsh and high-humidity environments.

    Linearity & Resolution

    High-linearity servo potentiometers with independent linearity down to ±0.05%. Ultra-fine resolution depending on resistance value.

    Ruggedised & Protected

    Shock and vibration rated units with potting and encapsulation. Waterproof configurations for demanding military and industrial applications.

    All designs account for resistance tolerance, linearity, environmental rating, and mechanical constraints. Contact us with your requirements.

    Applications

    Our wire wound potentiometers serve critical roles across diverse industries.

    FeedbackPosition

    Servo Control

    Precision position feedback for servo motors, actuators, robotics, and closed-loop control systems.

    PrecisionCalibration

    Instrumentation

    High-accuracy measurement and calibration for test equipment, laboratory instruments, and data acquisition.

    AutomationPLC

    Industrial Controls

    Reliable signal generation for PLCs, process control, factory automation, and motor drive systems.

    MIL-STDAvionics

    Defence & Aerospace

    MIL-spec potentiometers for weapon systems, radar positioning, flight controls, and avionics equipment.

    Efficient Toroidal Coil Corporation — Custom electromagnetic component manufacturer since 1994. Precision-engineered transformers and potentiometers made in Pune, India.
